SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF TEGSCO IS PRESENT. APPEARING IN COURT FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS DAN SCANLAN. DEFENDANT KENDALE STEPHON WILLIAMS IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK N WEBB, JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TEGSCO LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, KENDALE STEPHON $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,685.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
